title: calonemorchis rigida
intro: Calonemorchis rigida, also known as the rigid calonemorchis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally used in medicine, Calonemorchis rigida has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, Calonemorchis rigida is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", calonemorchis rigida benefits include its ability to exhibit immunostimulatory activity, particularly through its insoluble fraction, which can potentially be used as an immunostimulatory agent in humans.
